D9 BiologyL4 AnalyzeReference

Nacre — Aragonite Brick Walls

mollusc nacre is alternating ~500 nm aragonite (n=1.6) and ~30 nm protein layers — the brick-and-mortar gives both iridescence and exceptional mechanical strength

Nacre (mother-of-pearl) is built of aragonite tablets ~500 nm thick stacked with conchiolin protein interlayers. The high index contrast (1.6 vs 1.4) and regular spacing creates broadband multilayer interference — the iridescent sheen. The biomineralised structure is also 1000× tougher than monolithic aragonite.

Drag the aragonite thickness; reflection colour shifts.
